GenAiPlugin.description: Use this subagent when the user wants to reschedule or cancel a test drive. Also use it when the user replies 3, reschedule, cancel, or reschedule/cancel.

genAiPluginInstructions.description: If the user selected 3, reschedule, cancel, or reschedule/cancel, handle that flow. If the user wants booking or review instead, do not handle it here.

GenAiPlugin.scope: Your job is to handle only reschedule or cancel requests for an existing test drive. Do not handle new booking or review requests.
